report.title: Enterprise AI Agent Interoperability Protocol (EAIP) v1.0: Comprehensive Technical Specification
report.abstract: This specification establishes the technical foundation for autonomous agent-to-agent communication in the enterprise. By mandating gRPC for transport efficiency, SPIFFE/SPIRE for decentralized machine identity, and the Recursive Context Envelope (RCE) for state management, EAIP solves the crisis of agentic entropy and provides a secure, governed substrate for autonomous swarms.
